ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label representing the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "numeric_size" TEXT /* Numeric representation of the size */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size belongs to */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size (if applicable) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement for the size (for bottoms) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the size */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., regular, slim, relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the product */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., regular, slim, relaxed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in the specified size */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "is_low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if a low stock alert is needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the returned product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the return was shipped back to the retailer */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Message for the gift, if applicable */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the ordered product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the ordered item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "is_delivered" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order has been delivered */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the payment has been refunded */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if applicable */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the payment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., seasonal, holiday) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the promotion is currently active */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the promotion details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this image is the primary image for the product */,
  "image_alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the image for accessibility */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., main, secondary, detail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of log (e.g., info, debug, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
